description: This kind of corner situation occurred in of one of my games at the London Open Go Congress 2004 (although the outside shape has been simplified quite a lot here..) The status of the groups is, to say the least, non-trivial. I just analyzed it for quite some time, hope I got it right. As usual, if you find an error, please add a comment. (Thanks to tenbatsu, lok and tankero for doing so)
